message:
feat(ndarray,ufunc,conformance): add ndarray reshape improvements and oracle venv refinements

fnp-ndarray: Expand reshape handling for edge cases in stride
calculation and contiguity detection.

fnp-ufunc: Additional type information helper methods.

fnp-conformance: Refine oracle Python venv bootstrap error handling
and path resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
